title: guzmania sympaganthera
intro: Guzmania sympaganthera, also known as the pine cone bromeliad, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Guzmania sympaganthera can be used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
